case_title: LOPRETO, FLORIDALMA BAC VS. MARIA TERESA CAMINO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPRETO, FLORIDALMA BAC AS TO DEFENDANT CAMINO, MARIA TERESA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MASTER BUILDING MAINTENANCE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
